title: Japan come from behind twice to draw with Netherlands
summary: Japan came from behind twice to secure a 2-2 draw with the Netherlands in their 2026 World Cup opener in Dallas, with Daichi Kamada's late header earning a deserved point. The result gives Japan an important opening-match point in Group F despite trailing at two stages.
content: Daichi Kamada's late header rescues a deserved point for Japan against the Netherlands in their opening World Cup game in Dallas.

zh.title: 日本两度落后后与荷兰战平
zh.summary: 日本在达拉斯2026年世界杯揭幕战中两度落后后最终与荷兰战成2-2平手，镰田大地的禁区头球为日本赢得了宝贵的一分。尽管两度落后，日本在F组揭幕战中获得了重要的开场一分。

title: Kamada scores late equaliser for Japan
summary: Daichi Kamada scored a late equalizer to level Japan with the Netherlands in their Group F 2026 World Cup fixture. The goal proved crucial in rescuing a point for Japan in their opening match.
content: Watch as Japan's Daichi Kamada brings his side level to the Netherlands in their Group F fixture in the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 镰田大地为日本打入扳平球

title: 'Big goal from a big player!' - Van Dijk scores Netherlands opener
summary: Virgil van Dijk opened the scoring for the Netherlands against Japan in their 2026 World Cup Group F match. The goal gave the Dutch an early advantage in the contest.

title: Summerville scores 'sizzler' as Netherlands retake lead
summary: Crysencio Summerville scored to help the Netherlands regain the lead against Japan in their World Cup Group F fixture. The goal demonstrated the Netherlands' attacking capability in the match.
content: Crysencio Summerville's "sizzler" of a goal helps Netherlands retake the lead against Japan in their Group F fixture at the 2026 World Cup.

title: Arsenal & Liverpool in Bouaddi talks - Monday's gossip
summary: Arsenal and Liverpool are reportedly pursuing Lille midfielder Ayyoub Bouaddi, while Manchester City targets Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite in the transfer market. The moves reflect top clubs' efforts to strengthen their squads.

title: World Cup teams reject Ceferin 'uninteresting' claim

title: 'I'll be staying out of the way' - Southgate on World Cup punditry

title: England-Croatia referee was called Grade E by Tuchel
summary: Referee Clement Turpin has been assigned to England's opening 2026 World Cup match against Croatia on Wednesday, despite being previously criticized by England coach Thomas Tuchel as a "Grade E" official. The appointment has drawn scrutiny ahead of the fixture.
content: Clement Turpin is appointed referee for England's opening World Cup game against Croatia on Wednesday - and was once labelled a "Grade E" official by head coach Thomas Tuchel.

title: Havertz scores twice as Germany thrash Curacao
summary: Four-time World Cup champions Germany defeated debutants Curacao 4-1 in their Group E opener in Houston, with Kai Havertz scoring twice as Germany dominated after an early threat from Curacao. The victory showcased Germany's quality despite the competitive opposition.
content: Four-time winners Germany overcome a brief scare from World Cup debutants Curacao before turning on the style to win their Group E opener in Houston.

zh.title: 哈弗茨梅开二度，德国大胜库拉索

title: Comenencia scores Curacao's first-ever World Cup goal
summary: Livano Comenencia scored Curacao's first-ever World Cup goal in their Group E match against Germany, marking a historic achievement for the nation. The milestone represented a significant moment for Curacao despite their heavy defeat.
content: Livano Comenencia makes national history scoring Curacao's first-ever World Cup goal against Germany in their Group E match in Houston.

title: Why can't World Cup games kick off on time?

title: The 20-year-old who stole the show on Scotland's World Cup return

summary: Brazil salvaged a 1-1 draw against Morocco in their World Cup opener with a late Vinícius Jr. goal, but coach Carlo Ancelotti attributed the team's poor start to nerves and pressure. The result highlighted defensive vulnerabilities that could prove costly against stronger opponents.
content: Brazil boss Carlo Ancelotti suggested "nerves" got the better of his players during a dreadful start to their opening World Cup fixture against Morocco as his team settled for a 1-1 draw.

zh.title: 维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔为巴西对摩洛哥的比赛挽救了平局...
zh.summary: 巴西在世界杯首战中凭借维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔的后期进球扳成1-1平手，但教练卡洛·安切洛蒂将球队糟糕的开局归咎于紧张和压力。这一结果暴露了防线漏洞，这可能会对阵强队时付出代价。

title: Giroud: Pulisic reminded me of Hazard at Chelsea
summary: Olivier Giroud compares Christian Pulisic's playing style to Eden Hazard, praising the American winger's talent and potential ahead of the World Cup. The comparison from his former Chelsea teammate underscores Pulisic's quality on the global stage.
content: Olivier Giroud has said his former Chelsea and AC Milan teammate Christian Pulisic "reminded him of Eden Hazard."

zh.title: 吉鲁：普利西奇让我想起切尔西时期的阿扎尔
zh.summary: 奥利维耶·吉鲁将克里斯蒂安·普利西奇的比赛风格与伊登·阿扎尔进行比较，对这位美国边锋的才华和世界杯前的潜力表示赞扬。前切尔西队友的比较强调了普利西奇在全球舞台上的实力。

title: 2 Texas men charged after England WC gear stolen
summary: Two Texas men face felony charges for receiving stolen property after England's World Cup equipment was stolen before a match. The incident raises questions about security procedures and team preparations ahead of important fixtures.
content: Two men have been charged with one felony count each of receiving stolen property late Saturday after England's national team discovered that some of their equipment had been stolen.

zh.title: 英格兰世界杯装备被盗后，2名德州男子被控
zh.summary: 在英格兰世界杯装备在比赛前被盗后，两名德州男子因接收被盗财产而面临重罪指控。该事件引发了对安全程序和重要比赛前球队准备的质疑。

title: Swiss devastated as proud Qatar win 1st WC point
summary: Qatar claimed a dramatic late equalizer to earn a 1-1 draw against Switzerland in Group B, delivering a major upset in the World Cup. The result gives the underdogs crucial momentum despite being heavy tournament underdogs.
content: Qatar scored a stoppage-time goal to earn a shocking 1-1 draw with Group B favorites Switzerland on Saturday.

zh.title: 瑞士失落，卡塔尔赢得首个世界杯积分
zh.summary: 卡塔尔通过戏剧性的后期扳平，与瑞士在B组以1-1战平，创造了世界杯的重大冷门。尽管他们被看作本赛事的大冷门，但这个结果给他们带来了关键的动力。

title: Scotland ease 'pressure' with 1st WC win since 199...
summary: Scotland secured their first World Cup victory since 1998 with a win over Haiti, easing the psychological burden on Steve Clarke's team. The result provides momentum and confidence heading into the team's next challenge against Morocco.
content: Steve Clarke said his Scotland side's long-awaited World Cup win over Haiti means the team have less pressure on them as they prepare to face Morocco.

zh.title: 苏格兰以首次世界杯胜利缓解"压力"自1998年以来首胜
zh.summary: 苏格兰在击败海地的比赛中取得了自1998年以来的首次世界杯胜利，缓解了史蒂夫·克拉克球队肩上的心理负担。这场胜利为球队面对摩洛哥的下一个挑战提供了动力和信心。

title: Depay fit to start as Netherlands prepare for Japa...
summary: The Netherlands received positive injury news with Ronald Koeman confirming Memphis Depay and Bart Verbruggen are available to start against Japan in their Group F opener. The availability of these key players strengthens Dutch prospects in a competitive group.
content: Netherlands have been handed a major boost after Ronald Koeman said Memphis Depay and Bart Verbruggen are both fit to start Sunday's Group F opener against Japan.

zh.title: 德佩状态良好，荷兰队备战日本比赛
zh.summary: 荷兰队传来了积极的伤病消息，罗纳德·科曼确认门菲斯·德佩和巴特·费尔布鲁根可以在小组F的首场比赛中出场迎战日本。这些关键球员的出场增强了荷兰队在这个竞争激烈的小组中的前景。

title: Sources: Chicago want Goretzka, Lewandowski
summary: Chicago is reportedly interested in signing Leon Goretzka and Robert Lewandowski, with the possibility of one German World Cup player extending his U.S. stay beyond the tournament. The transfer speculation highlights the league's ambitions to attract top European talent.
content: As Germany opens its World Cup against Curacao on Sunday, one of its players may end up extending his stay in the United States beyond the tournament.

zh.title: 消息源：芝加哥想要戈雷茨卡和莱万多夫斯基
zh.summary: 据报道，芝加哥有意签下莱昂·戈雷茨卡和罗伯特·莱万多夫斯基，其中一位德国世界杯球员可能会将其美国停留时间延长至赛事之后。这一转会传言突出了该联赛吸引欧洲顶级人才的野心。

title: Clinical Australia upset Turkey in World Cup opener
summary: Australia delivered an impressive performance to defeat Turkey in their World Cup opener, with 20-year-old Nestory Irankunda making history as the Socceroos' youngest-ever World Cup goalscorer. The clinical victory sets a strong tone for Australia's tournament campaign.
content: Watch highlights as Australia beat Turkey in their opening match, with 20-year-old Nestory Irankunda becoming the Socceroos's youngest ever World Cup goalscorer.

zh.title: 澳洲凌厉击败土耳其 创造世界杯开局佳绩
zh.summary: 澳大利亚在世界杯首战中表现出色，击败了土耳其，20岁的内斯托里·伊兰昆达创造历史，成为袋鼠队历史上最年轻的世界杯进球者。这次凌厉的胜利为澳大利亚的锦标赛之旅奠定了良好基调。

title: Football Daily
summary: Scotland has returned to the World Cup after a lengthy absence and marked their return with a winning performance in their opening match. The return represents a significant moment for Scottish football after decades away from the tournament.
content: Scotland are back and they've started their World Cup with a win.

zh.title: 每日足球
zh.summary: 苏格兰在长期缺席后重返世界杯，并在首场比赛中以胜利标志其回归。这一回归对于苏格兰足球来说具有重要意义，因为他们已经离开这项赛事数十年。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 7
summary: This interactive guessing game challenges readers to identify a World Cup player with the number 7, testing football knowledge with minimal attempts required. The feature offers an engaging way for fans to test their knowledge of tournament stars.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯7号明星
zh.summary: 这个互动猜谜游戏挑战读者识别一位穿7号球衣的世界杯球员，测试足球知识需要最少的尝试次数。这项功能为球迷提供了一种有趣的方式来测试他们对赛事明星的了解。

title: Shirts, stuffed lions & Lego - the stolen England items worth $18,000
summary: Two men face charges for stealing approximately $18,000 worth of property from England's training base in Kansas City, including team shirts, merchandise, and personal items. The theft incident highlights security concerns at major tournament training facilities.
content: Two men are charged for stealing $18,000 worth of property from England at their Kansas City training base.

zh.title: 衬衫、毛绒狮子和乐高——价值1.8万美元的被盗英格兰物品
zh.summary: 两名男子因从堪萨斯城的英格兰训练基地盗窃价值约1.8万美元的财产而面临指控，包括球队衬衫、商品和个人物品。这起盗窃事件突显了主要赛事训练设施的安全隐患。

title: What does 1-0 win mean for Scotland's chances of qualification?
summary: With eight third-place finishers advancing to the knockout rounds, Scotland's opening 1-0 victory could be sufficient to achieve qualification despite potentially finishing third in their group. The narrow win provides hope for the Scottish team's tournament prospects.
content: With eight third-place finishers advancing to the last 32, might three points be enough for Scotland to make history?

zh.title: 1-0胜利对苏格兰晋级前景意味着什么?
zh.summary: 随着八个小组第三名队伍晋级淘汰赛，苏格兰的开局1-0胜利可能足以确保晋级，即使他们可能在小组中排名第三。这场惜胜为苏格兰队的锦标赛前景带来了希望。

title: England's first World Cup training session: What did we learn?
summary: England held their first training session at their Kansas City base in preparation for the World Cup, providing early insights into their tournament preparations. The session offered analysts and fans a glimpse of how the team is shaping up under new management.
content: England have had their first training session in Kansas City - what did we learn?

zh.title: 英格兰首场世界杯训练课：我们学到了什么?
zh.summary: 英格兰在堪萨斯城基地举行了首场世界杯备战训练，为他们的锦标赛准备提供了早期见解。这次训练让分析人士和球迷看到了这支球队在新管理层下的发展状况。

title: Why Haiti v Scotland was antidote to the ills of world football
summary: Scotland's opening World Cup victory over Haiti, though not a stylistically brilliant performance, represented an important return for the nation and a welcome departure from football's broader challenges. The match demonstrated that grit and determination can overcome uncertainty in tournament football.
content: It might have been nervy. It might not have been pretty. But Scotland are here. And Scotland have won. Tom English reports from Boston.

zh.title: 为什么海地对苏格兰的比赛是世界足球痼疾的解药?
zh.summary: 苏格兰在开局世界杯比赛中战胜海地，虽然表现风格并不出色，但代表了苏格兰的重要回归，也是对足球广泛挑战的受欢迎的背离。这场比赛证明了意志力和决心可以在锦标赛足球中克服不确定性。

title: 'A must win game and we won' - Clarke
summary: Scotland manager Steve Clarke praised his team's 1-0 victory over Haiti as a crucial result at Boston Stadium. Clarke emphasized the importance of winning in their Group C opener.
content: Scotland manager Steve Clarke reacts to his side's 1-0 victory over Haiti in their Group C opener at the Boston Stadium.

zh.title: "一场必须赢的比赛，我们赢了"——克拉克
zh.summary: 苏格兰主教练史蒂夫·克拉克称球队在波士顿体育场1-0击败海地的胜利至关重要。克拉克强调了在小组赛首战中获胜的重要性。

title: McGinn fires Scotland to first World Cup win for 36 years
summary: John McGinn scored the winning goal as Scotland defeated Haiti 1-0 to secure their first World Cup victory in 36 years. The result marks a significant milestone for the Scottish national team.
content: John McGinn's goal was enough as Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 at the Boston Stadium to record their first win at a World Cup for 36 years.

zh.title: 麦金助苏格兰获得36年来首个世界杯胜利
zh.summary: 约翰·麦金打进制胜球，苏格兰1-0击败海地，获得了36年来首次世界杯胜利。这个结果是苏格兰国家队的重要里程碑。

title: McGinn 'beaming with pride' - and hopes kids around Scotland are too
summary: Scotland's John McGinn expressed pride in his goal that defeated Haiti in their World Cup opener, despite describing it as "scuffed." He hopes the victory inspires young fans across Scotland.
content: Scotland's John McGinn says his "scuffed" goal which downed Haiti in their World Cup opener leaves him "beaming with pride".

zh.title: 麦金"满怀自豪感"——并希望苏格兰各地的孩子们也是
zh.summary: 苏格兰的约翰·麦金为自己在世界杯首战中击败海地的进球感到自豪，尽管他将其描述为"运气球"。他希望这场胜利能激励苏格兰各地的年轻球迷。

title: Has Vinicius Jr brilliance just papered over the Brazilian cracks?
summary: Vinicius Jr scored a stunning goal to rescue Brazil against Morocco, but the performance raised broader concerns about the team's overall play. The result highlighted both the star's individual brilliance and potential vulnerabilities in the squad.
content: Vinicius Jr scores a wonder goal to rescue his side but Brazil's performance against Morocco raises more questions than answers.

zh.title: 维尼修斯青年的光芒是否只是掩盖了巴西的裂痕？
zh.summary: 维尼修斯青年打进一个精彩进球拯救巴西对阵摩洛哥的比赛，但这场表现引发了对球队整体水平的更广泛担忧。这个结果既突出了这位明星的个人天才，也暴露了球队的潜在漏洞。

title: McGinn gives Scotland the lead against Haiti
summary: John McGinn put Scotland 1-0 ahead against Haiti in their Group C World Cup match at Boston Stadium. The goal proved decisive in securing the victory.
content: John McGinn puts Scotland 1-0 up against Haiti in their Group C opener at the Boston Stadium.

zh.title: 麦金为苏格兰打进对海地的领先球
zh.summary: 约翰·麦金在波士顿体育场的C组世界杯比赛中为苏格兰1-0领先海地。这个进球对确保胜利起到了决定性作用。

title: 'Just listen to this!' - Scotland are back at the World Cup after 28 years
summary: Scotland's players and fans sang Flower of Scotland at a World Cup for the first time in 28 years before their match against Haiti. The emotional moment marked the nation's return to the tournament.
content: Scotland's players and fans sing Flower of Scotland at a World Cup for the first time in 28 years before their match against Haiti at the Boston Stadium.

zh.title: "听听这个！" - 苏格兰时隔28年重返世界杯
zh.summary: 苏格兰球员和球迷在与海地比赛前在世界杯上唱起了《苏格兰之花》，这是28年来的第一次。这个感人的时刻标志着该国重返这项赛事。

title: Was this offside? Technology fault leaves questions over VAR images
summary: FIFA blamed a technical fault for delaying VAR images after a controversial offside call in Qatar's World Cup draw with Switzerland. The incident raised questions about the reliability of VAR technology in critical match moments.
content: Fifa have blamed a technical fault for the delay in releasing the VAR images after a potential - and controversial - offside call during Qatar's World Cup draw with Switzerland.

zh.title: 这是越位吗？技术故障引发对VAR图像的质疑
zh.summary: FIFA将VAR图像延迟的原因归咎于技术故障，这发生在卡塔尔与瑞士世界杯平局中的一个有争议的越位判罚之后。该事件引发了人们对VAR技术在关键比赛时刻可靠性的质疑。

title: Spectacular Vinicius Jr goal earns Brazil draw against Morocco
summary: Vinicius Jr scored a spectacular solo goal to secure a draw for five-time World Cup winners Brazil against Morocco at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. The goal demonstrated the Brazilian forward's individual quality in an opening Group C match.
content: Vinicius Jr scores a spectacular solo goal to earn a draw for five-time winners Brazil against Morocco at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

zh.title: 维尼修斯Jr精彩进球为巴西对阵摩洛哥平局立功
zh.summary: 维尼修斯Jr在新泽西州大都会体育场对阵摩洛哥的比赛中打入精彩进球，为五次世界杯冠军巴西赢得平局。这个进球在C组首场比赛中展现了这位巴西前锋的个人实力。
